# web-front-end-angular

- kind: ui
- sourcePath: web-front-end/angular
- language: TypeScript
- framework: Angular
- buildTool: npm
- defaultPort: 18093
- dependsOn: account-service|trade-service|position-service|reference-data|people-service|trade-feed
- requiredEnv: none

Notes:
"Primary UI for account/trade workflows."
